multiple things next to each other (with emphasis)

from hunger (in مِن جُوعٍ - from hunger)

baseForms.m: to be hollow or have space inside

derivedForms.m: of the atmosphere (describing where الطَّيْرِ/birds are)

baseForms.m: to arrive or come to a place
